title: Kado - Regional Restrictions
description: what is "Buying Power" and how do I increase it?

actions.value:
Kado Ramp is live in 150+ countries, and all US states except for Alaska, Arkansas, Connecticut, New York, North Carolina, and Texas due to state regulations.

 

Bank transfers are not currently available in FL, LA, and AK - so you may not see ACH purchase option appear in these states, but you can technically still use Kado Ramp for purchasing crypto via Bank Wire Transfer. Let us know if you'd like to learn more about this or have any other questions.

 

(source: https://faq.kado.money/en/article/where-is-kado-operational-1oe3bht)
